description: Small public stats pack for smoke-testing paper figure reproduction without GPU access.

source.notes: This pack is intentionally small. Full paper-scale outputs should be distributed separately as release artifacts or datasets.

token_attention_bar.description: Token-type key-importance comparison for baseline padding vs comma padding.

same_norm.description: K/V heatmap and attention-score comparison for sink vs random tokens.

norm_paradox_panel.description: Key norm and attention-score curves showing comparable norms but divergent attention.

band_norm.description: RoPE band energy heatmap from the FLUX sink analysis JSON.
